title: Luffy Laughs Against Kaido
description: On pages 19–21, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15 as Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.
scene: Luffy awakens Gear Fifth and fights Kaido as Onigashima’s fall, Wano’s fire festival, and twenty years of suffering converge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: this is bad... I have to stop him....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You pirates sure keep frightening pets.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can go try to stop that monster if you like...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...but my mission is to stop YOU.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's about time I wrap this up!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't dodge with my legs all slippery like this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: One leg has gone back to normal!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 15 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
